stemHtml: An aeroplane on final approach is flying at a CAS lower than VMD, which means it is speed unstable. If the speed suddenly decreases, what effect do parasite and induced drag have on total drag?

options.a: Parasite drag increases, induced drag reduces by the same amount, so total drag stays the same.
options.b: Parasite drag reduces, induced drag increases by a larger amount, so total drag increases.
options.c: Parasite drag reduces, induced drag increases by a smaller amount, so total drag reduces.
options.d: Parasite drag increases, induced drag reduces by a smaller amount, so total drag increases.
